text_block_list.text:
We've come to summer camp, where racers train
extra hard to get better. It's important that Seiun
Sky improves significantly in the run-up to the
Kikuka Sho. Speaking of Sky...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Of course I am! This is summer camp, ain't it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's the gentle yet harsh place that's perfect for
runners who wanna improve! In other words...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We're at the sea! There's fishing! This is my
chance to catch a fish I've never laid eyes on
before!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look, I even brought a field guide! There are
some pretty cool creatures in the waters here. ♪
choice_data_list: Save some of that enthusiasm for training too.
Save some of that enthusiasm for training too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: "Training," you say? Not sure I know that word.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm kidding. You know I get it. ☆ Don't worry, I'll train too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Tons of different racers come to camp, which
means it's the perfect place to gather
information. And most importantly...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Spe and the others are here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, I've got plenty of time—to catch my first
fish, that is! No, my first ten!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That rocky cliff over there looks promising! Let's
go check it out. ♪

And with that, my spirited(?) summer camp
experience with Seiun Sky begins.
